subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God, steadfast and assured leaf! The house which thou didst dedicate as a pilgrim house hath been accepted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه موقنه روحاء خانه که وقف مسافرخانه نمودید مقبول گردید باید
subcodes.subjects: @cleanliness and refinement, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
